description: Admin team member management - view, add, edit, remove team members, manage roles and permissions. All operations are localStorage-based.
authentication: No real backend - admin auth is localStorage-based
dataStorage: Pure localStorage - key: 'team_members', seed: teamData import

endpoints.name: Get All Team Members

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Displays team member cards/list with avatar, name, email, phone, role, status, join date, and action buttons

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Team member cards with large avatar, name, role badge, email/phone, status indicator, joined date, and action buttons (edit, toggle status, manage permissions, delete). Owner card has delete disabled.

endpoints.name: Add Team Member

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin submits Add Member form. Validates email and phone uniqueness if provided.
frontendUsage.mockBehavior: Adds with auto-generated id, avatar fallback, status 'Active', joinDate

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Shows success toast, member card appears in team list

endpoints.name: Update Team Member

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin saves edited member. Validates email/phone uniqueness (excluding self).

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Shows success toast, member card updates

endpoints.name: Delete Team Member
endpoints.description: Remove a team member (owner cannot be deleted)

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin confirms deletion. Throws error if trying to delete the owner.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Confirmation dialog, success toast (or error toast for owner), member card removed

endpoints.name: Toggle Member Status
endpoints.description: Toggle between Active and Disabled (owner cannot be disabled)

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin clicks status toggle. Skips toggle for owner role.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Status badge toggles between green (Active) and gray (Disabled)

endpoints.name: Update Permissions

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin saves permission changes from the permissions management dialog/modal

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Shows success toast, permissions matrix/doggles update
